name: Community — SeFi-Image
author: SeFi-Team
description: SeFi-Image 5B — Semantic-First Diffusion (Flux 2 Klein-based). Excellent text rendering and stylized art (posters, anime, watercolor). Runs via the Rebels SeFi custom nodes.

presets.name: SeFi-Image 5B Turbo (Q8)
presets.tagline: 4-step semantic-first — great text and stylized art
presets.description: SeFi-Image 5B Turbo, GGUF Q8. Semantic-First Diffusion resolves structure ahead of texture — strong at rendered text, posters, and stylized illustration (anime, watercolor, low-poly). 4-step distilled; not aimed at photoreal portraits.

requirements.notes: SeFi 5B Turbo GGUF Q8 (diffusion_models) + SeFi Qwen3-VL-4B encoder (clip\) + SeFi's OWN VAE (a generic Flux 2 VAE loads but degrades output - NOT interchangeable). Requires the ComfyUI_Rebels_SeFi custom node (github.com/RealRebelAI/ComfyUI_Rebels_SeFi; the INNER ComfyUI_Rebels_SeFi folder goes in custom_nodes). Steps/guidance hardcoded (Turbo allows 4/8/10 steps, guidance 1.0 only). Monolithic SEFI_PIPE - user LoRAs not supported. Encoder runs on CPU and unloads after encode (16GB-RAM friendly).
